2026-04-11T01:13:35.8919015Z Done. I filed a GitHub issue titled **"[AgentServer Responses] Docs: document EmitAnnotationAdded builder lifecycle and RefusalContentBuilder full API"** for `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`, triggered by PR #58094 by @RaviPidaparthi.
2026-04-11T01:13:35.8920842Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:35.8921969Z **Gaps documented in the issue:**
2026-04-11T01:13:37.6856566Z 1. `EmitAnnotationAdded` is completely absent from all markdown docs — the full `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle step (`EmitTextDone → EmitAnnotationAdded × N → EmitDone`) isn't shown anywhere
2026-04-11T01:13:37.8622934Z 2. `Sample15_Annotations.md` only covers the convenience generator; no sample shows the full builder flow for streaming deltas + annotations
2026-04-11T01:13:38.0158542Z 3. `handler-implementation-guide.md` mentions "text + refusal" as the main reason for the builder API but has no code example for `RefusalContentBuilder` (`AddRefusalContent → EmitRefusalDone → EmitDone`)

2026-04-11T01:13:41.7963566Z ◆ I've found a documentation gap! The `TextContentBuilder` now has an `EmitAnnotationAdded` method that allows adding annotations through the full builder API (as opposed to the convenience generator in `ResponseEventStream`). This new method is documented in the XML docs and the class summary, but it's NOT documented in either:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7964955Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7965215Z   1. The `handler-implementation-guide.md` 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7965491Z   2. The `README.md`
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7965967Z   3. The sample files - `Sample15_Annotations.md` only shows the convenience method, not the full builder API for annotations
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7966809Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7967735Z   Also, the new builder lifecycle pattern (EmitTextDone/EmitDone split for text content, EmitRefusalDone/EmitDone split for refusal content, and auto-tracking of children in OutputItemMessageBuilder) represents an API change that needs to be clearly documented.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7968707Z    
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7970274Z   Now I'm seeing the specific API changes: `TextContentBuilder` split its `EmitDone` method into `EmitTextDone` for the output_text event and a new `EmitDone` for content_part completion, while also adding internal delta and annotation tracking with a new `Annotations` property. `RefusalContentBuilder` follows a similar pattern with `EmitRefusalDone` and `EmitDone`, and `OutputItemMessageBuilder` was removed entirely.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7971772Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7972914Z   The builder pattern now auto-tracks child content through `AddTextContent` and `AddRefusalContent`, with `EmitDone` constructing the final content from those tracked children. `OutputItemReasoningItemBuilder` similarly removed its `EmitSummaryPartDone` method in favor of auto-tracking through `AddSummaryPart`.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7974130Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7975922Z   The documentation is missing coverage of the `EmitAnnotationAdded` method in the handler implementation guide—it's only documented in the convenience generator section, leaving a gap in the full builder lifecycle for annotations. The builder reference table also doesn't fully capture the complete `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle with its optional parameters.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7977658Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7978084Z   Let me double-check the handler guide to see if `EmitAnnotationAdded` is actually documented somewhere I missed.

2026-04-11T01:13:41.7988757Z ✓ $ sed -n '750,830p' /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net/sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/docs/handler-implementation-guide.md
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7989423Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7989817Z ◆ Now I have a clear picture. The key documentation gap in the handler-implementation-guide.md is that:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7990300Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7991336Z   1. **The `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle with annotations is not documented.** The builder class summary says the full lifecycle is `EmitAdded → EmitDelta (0+) → EmitTextDone → EmitAnnotationAdded (0+) → EmitDone`, but the handler guide only shows:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7992501Z      - Convenience generators (which handle annotations via `OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`)
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7993355Z      - Full builder API without annotation steps (`EmitAdded → EmitDelta → EmitTextDone → EmitDone` without `EmitAnnotationAdded`)
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7993901Z      
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7995152Z   2. **Sample15_Annotations.md** only covers the convenience method for annotations, leaving no example for developers who need the full builder API to stream deltas while attaching annotations, and the `Annotations` property on `TextContentBuilder` that allows `EmitDone()` to include tracked child annotations isn't documented either.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7996642Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.7999356Z   The PR introduces several new builder methods: `TextContentBuilder` gains `EmitTextDone(string?)` for `output_text.done` and `EmitAnnotationAdded(Annotation)` for zero or more annotations, plus `EmitDone()` for `content_part.done`; `RefusalContentBuilder` gets `EmitRefusalDone(string)` and `EmitDone()`; `OutputItemMessageBuilder` and `OutputItemReasoningItemBuilder` auto-track their children through `AddTextContent`/`AddRefusalContent` and `AddSummaryPart` respectively. The handler-implementation-guide.md already demonstrates the `EmitTextDone`/`EmitDone` separation but doesn't show how to use `EmitAnnotationAdded` within the full builder workflow, and Sample15_Annotations.md has the same gap.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8001951Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8002914Z ✓ $ grep -n "EmitTextDone\|EmitDone\|EmitTextDelta\|AddSummaryPart" /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net/sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/src/Builders/ReasoningSummaryPartBuilder.cs | head -20
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8003771Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8004273Z ✓ $ grep -rn "EmitAnnotationAdded" /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net/sdk/agentserver/ --include="*.md" | head -10
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8004758Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8005327Z ◆ Now I have a clear documentation gap to file. The `EmitAnnotationAdded` method on `TextContentBuilder` is not documented anywhere in the markdown docs:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8005982Z   - Not in `handler-implementation-guide.md`
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8006583Z   - Not in `README.md`  
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8006878Z   - Not in any of the sample `.md` files
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8007119Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8007498Z   The only place it's documented is in XML docs in the source code and in the class summary comment.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8008441Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8009940Z   Also, `Sample15_Annotations.md` only shows the convenience method approach (`OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`), but doesn't show how to use `EmitAnnotationAdded` in the full builder flow when you need to stream text deltas AND attach annotations.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8011061Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8011214Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8012110Z   I should also check if `RefusalContentBuilder` has the same documentation problem—the `EmitRefusalDone` method is new in this PR and I need to verify whether any samples actually demonstrate how to use it.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8012838Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8013516Z ✓ $ grep -rn "RefusalContent\|EmitRefusalDone\|refusal" /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-net/azure-sdk-for-net/sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/samples/ | head -20

2026-04-11T01:13:41.8017171Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8017338Z ◆ Now I've confirmed the documentation gaps:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8017597Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8018779Z   1. **The handler-implementation-guide.md** says "When you need multiple content parts in one message (e.g., text + refusal)" but doesn't actually show a code example with `AddRefusalContent()` + `EmitRefusalDone()` + `EmitDone()`. It only shows text content. The guide mentions refusal but doesn't document the builder lifecycle for `RefusalContentBuilder`.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8020021Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8020514Z   2. **`EmitAnnotationAdded` is completely undocumented** in all markdown docs. The `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle with annotation steps is:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8021337Z      `EmitAdded → EmitDelta (0+) → EmitTextDone → EmitAnnotationAdded (0+) → EmitDone`
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8021699Z      
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8022009Z      The handler-implementation-guide.md and samples never show this step either.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8022383Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8023224Z   3. **Sample15_Annotations.md** only covers the convenience generator approach (`OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`), leaving no documentation for handlers that need to stream text deltas while adding annotations using the full builder pattern.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8024127Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8024324Z   These gaps are clear enough to file as an issue.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8024527Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8025691Z ◆ Now I have a clear picture of the documentation gaps. The PR introduced a new builder lifecycle with `EmitAnnotationAdded` on `TextContentBuilder` and `EmitRefusalDone` on `RefusalContentBuilder`, but neither the handler implementation guide nor any sample documents:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8027292Z   1. How to use `EmitAnnotationAdded` in the full builder API for streaming text with annotations
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8027882Z   2. A code example for the `RefusalContentBuilder` full lifecycle with `EmitRefusalDone`

2026-04-11T01:13:41.8050106Z ◆ Now I have a complete picture. Let me summarize the documentation gaps:
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8050639Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8051040Z   1. **`handler-implementation-guide.md`** (and possibly the README):
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8052958Z      - The "Text Messages → Using builders" section shows the `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle but stops at `EmitTextDone` + `EmitDone`. It **does not document `EmitAnnotationAdded`** as a step in the full builder lifecycle for adding annotations when streaming deltas.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8055266Z      - The section title mentions "multiple content parts (text + refusal)" but provides NO code example with `RefusalContentBuilder` (`AddRefusalContent()` + `EmitRefusalDone()` + `EmitDone()`).
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8057184Z      - There's also no mention of the `response.output_text.annotation.added` SSE event anywhere in the guide.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8057962Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8058355Z   2. **`Sample15_Annotations.md`** (and `Sample15Snippets.cs`):
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8059202Z      - Only documents the convenience generator approach (`OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`).
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8060378Z      - Missing: A builder API example showing how to stream text deltas AND add annotations afterward using `EmitAnnotationAdded`.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8061163Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8062032Z   3. **No sample exists for refusal content** using the full builder API with `AddRefusalContent()` + `EmitRefusalDone()`.
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8062878Z   
2026-04-11T01:13:41.8063870Z   The most impactful gap is #1 — the handler guide doesn't fully document the annotation streaming workflow or the refusal builder pattern.

2026-04-11T01:13:41.9972150Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-11T01:13:18.197626349Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/`\n**Triggered by:** [REDACTED] (PR #58094) by @RaviPidaparthi\n\n## What Changed\n\nPR #58094 refactored the builder lifecycle so that each content builder owns its full event lifecycle end-to-end:\n\n- `TextContentBuilder`: introduced `EmitTextDone(string?)` for `response.output_text.done` and a separate `EmitDone()` for `response.content_part.done`; added `EmitAnnotationAdded(Annotation)` (0+) between the two; added an `Annotations` property so `OutputItemMessageBuilder.EmitDone()` auto-builds the final message from tracked children\n- `RefusalContentBuilder`: introduced `EmitRefusalDone(string)` for `response.refusal.done` and a separate `EmitDone()` for `response.content_part.done`\n- `OutputItemMessageBuilder`: `AddTextContent`/`AddRefusalContent` now auto-track child builders; `EmitDone()` builds from them (removed manual `EmitContentDone()` overloads)\n- `OutputItemReasoningItemBuilder`: `AddSummaryPart` auto-tracks children; removed `EmitSummaryPartDone()`\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **`EmitAnnotationAdded` is undocumented in all markdown docs.** The full `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle is `EmitAdded → EmitDelta (0+) → EmitTextDone → EmitAnnotationAdded (0+) → EmitDone`, but no documentation or sample shows the `EmitAnnotationAdded` step. A developer who needs to stream text deltas _and_ attach annotations has no reference for how to use the full builder API.\n- **`Sample15_Annotations.md` only demonstrates the convenience generator** (`OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`). There is no sample showing the full builder API flow that combines streaming deltas with `EmitAnnotationAdded`. The `response.output_text.annotation.added` SSE event produced by `EmitAnnotationAdded` is never mentioned in any markdown doc.\n- **`RefusalContentBuilder` builder API is undocumented.** `handler-implementation-guide.md` names \"text + refusal\" as the primary reason to use the builder API but provides no code example for `AddRefusalContent()` → `EmitRefusalDone()` → `EmitDone()`.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### 1a. `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/docs/handler-implementation-guide.md`\n\n**Edit** — in the \"Text Messages → Using builders (fine-grained control)\" subsection, extend the existing code block after `EmitTextDone` to show the annotation step. Replace the current example ending:\n\n```csharp\nyield return text.EmitTextDone(\"First chunk of text. Second chunk. \");\n\nyield return text.EmitDone();\nyield return message.EmitDone();\n```\n\nwith:\n\n```csharp\nyield return text.EmitTextDone(\"First chunk of text. Second chunk. \");\n\n// Optionally attach annotations (file refs, citations, URLs) after finalizing text.\n// Each call produces a response.output_text.annotation.added SSE event.\nyield return text.EmitAnnotationAdded(new FilePath(fileId: \"/reports/summary.pdf\", index: 0));\n\nyield return text.EmitDone();      // response.content_part.done — includes all annotations\nyield return message.EmitDone();\n```\n\nAdd a note: _`OutputItemMessageBuilder.EmitDone()` reads the `Annotations` property on each tracked `TextContentBuilder` to build the final `content[].annotations` array automatically — no manual wiring needed._\n\n**Edit** — immediately after the text builder example, add a \"Refusal content\" example:\n\n```csharp\n// Emitting refusal content with the full builder API\nvar message = stream.AddOutputItemMessage();\nyield return message.EmitAdded();\n\nvar refusal = message.AddRefusalContent();\nyield return refusal.EmitAdded();\n\nyield return refusal.EmitDelta(\"I cannot help with that request.\");\nyield return refusal.EmitRefusalDone(\"I cannot help with that request.\");\n\nyield return refusal.EmitDone();   // response.content_part.done\nyield return message.EmitDone();\n```\n\n**Edit** — update the builder lifecycle reference table (near line 433) to include the full `TextContentBuilder` step sequence:\n\n```\nTextContentBuilder: EmitAdded() → EmitDelta(chunk) × N → EmitTextDone(text?) → EmitAnnotationAdded(annotation) × N → EmitDone()\nRefusalContentBuilder: EmitAdded() → EmitDelta(chunk) × N → EmitRefusalDone(text) → EmitDone()\n```\n\n#### 1b. `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/samples/Sample15_Annotations.md`\n\n**Edit** — add a new section after the existing convenience generator example:\n\n```markdown\n## Using the full builder API (streaming deltas with annotations)\n\nWhen you need to stream text tokens incrementally _and_ attach annotations, use `AddTextContent()` with `EmitAnnotationAdded()`:\n\n```C# Snippet:Responses_Sample15_StreamingAnnotationsHandler\npublic class StreamingAnnotationsHandler : ResponseHandler\n{\n    public override async IAsyncEnumerable\u003cResponseStreamEvent\u003e CreateAsync(\n        CreateResponse request,\n        ResponseContext context,\n        [EnumeratorCancellation] CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n    {\n        var stream = new ResponseEventStream(context, request);\n        yield return stream.EmitCreated();\n        yield return stream.EmitInProgress();\n\n        var message = stream.AddOutputItemMessage();\n        yield return message.EmitAdded();\n\n        var text = message.AddTextContent();\n        yield return text.EmitAdded();\n\n        yield return text.EmitDelta(\"Here is the \");\n        yield return text.EmitDelta(\"monthly summary. \");\n\n        // Finalize text (merges accumulated deltas automatically when no override is passed)\n        yield return text.EmitTextDone();\n\n        // Each EmitAnnotationAdded produces a response.output_text.annotation.added event\n        yield return text.EmitAnnotationAdded(new FilePath(fileId: \"/reports/monthly-summary.pdf\", index: 0));\n\n        yield return text.EmitDone();     // response.content_part.done — annotations included\n        yield return message.EmitDone();  // response.output_item.done\n\n        yield return stream.EmitCompleted();\n        await Task.CompletedTask;\n    }\n}\n\\```\n```\n\n#### 1c. `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/tests/Snippets/Sample15Snippets.cs`\n\n**Edit** — add a new `[Test]` method and `#region Snippet:Responses_Sample15_StreamingAnnotationsHandler` block implementing `StreamingAnnotationsHandler` (see 1b). Wrap any test-only assertions in `#if !SNIPPET` / `#endif`. Follow the pattern of the existing `FileAnnotationsHandler` region in the same file.\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n1. **Write the sample code** in `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/tests/Snippets/Sample15Snippets.cs`:\n   - Class `StreamingAnnotationsHandler` in `#region Snippet:Responses_Sample15_StreamingAnnotationsHandler` / `#endregion`\n   - The snippet name must be exactly `Responses_Sample15_StreamingAnnotationsHandler`\n\n2. **Add the placeholder** in `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/samples/Sample15_Annotations.md`:\n   ` ```C# Snippet:Responses_Sample15_StreamingAnnotationsHandler ` followed by closing ` ``` `\n\n3. Use `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/tests/samples/Sample1_HelloWorld.cs` as the canonical snippet pattern example.\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\n`sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/README.md` already has all required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing). No structural changes needed — the README links to `handler-implementation-guide.md` for builder API details.\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun in order:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 agentserver` — confirm `Sample15_Annotations.md` is updated with the new snippet content\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 agentserver` — no public API changes expected; confirm no diff\n5. `dotnet format sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above","title":"[AgentServer Responses] Docs: document EmitAnnotationAdded builder lifecycle and RefusalContentBuilder full API"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-11T01:13:42.0320573Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0320578Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0320698Z **Package:** `Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses`
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0320883Z **Service directory:** `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/`
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321119Z **Triggered by:** be03bd4776ad83e483eb230cec9ce24ac56529b2 (PR #58094) by @RaviPidaparthi
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321123Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321198Z ## What Changed
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321201Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321520Z PR #58094 refactored the builder lifecycle so that each content builder owns its full event lifecycle end-to-end:
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0321530Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0322599Z - `TextContentBuilder`: introduced `EmitTextDone(string?)` for `response.output_text.done` and a separate `EmitDone()` for `response.content_part.done`; added `EmitAnnotationAdded(Annotation)` (0+) between the two; added an `Annotations` property so `OutputItemMessageBuilder.EmitDone()` auto-builds the final message from tracked children
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0323169Z - `RefusalContentBuilder`: introduced `EmitRefusalDone(string)` for `response.refusal.done` and a separate `EmitDone()` for `response.content_part.done`
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0323702Z - `OutputItemMessageBuilder`: `AddTextContent`/`AddRefusalContent` now auto-track child builders; `EmitDone()` builds from them (removed manual `EmitContentDone()` overloads)
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0324007Z - `OutputItemReasoningItemBuilder`: `AddSummaryPart` auto-tracks children; removed `EmitSummaryPartDone()`
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0324011Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0324087Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0324227Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0325664Z - **`EmitAnnotationAdded` is undocumented in all markdown docs.** The full `TextContentBuilder` lifecycle is `EmitAdded → EmitDelta (0+) → EmitTextDone → EmitAnnotationAdded (0+) → EmitDone`, but no documentation or sample shows the `EmitAnnotationAdded` step. A developer who needs to stream text deltas _and_ attach annotations has no reference for how to use the full builder API.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0326959Z - **`Sample15_Annotations.md` only demonstrates the convenience generator** (`OutputItemMessage(text, annotations)`). There is no sample showing the full builder API flow that combines streaming deltas with `EmitAnnotationAdded`. The `response.output_text.annotation.added` SSE event produced by `EmitAnnotationAdded` is never mentioned in any markdown doc.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0327903Z - **`RefusalContentBuilder` builder API is undocumented.** `handler-implementation-guide.md` names "text + refusal" as the primary reason to use the builder API but provides no code example for `AddRefusalContent()` → `EmitRefusalDone()` → `EmitDone()`.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0327914Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0327988Z <details>
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328189Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328193Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328507Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328511Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328597Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328602Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328873Z #### 1a. `sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/docs/handler-implementation-guide.md`
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0328878Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329590Z **Edit** — in the "Text Messages → Using builders (fine-grained control)" subsection, extend the existing code block after `EmitTextDone` to show the annotation step. Replace the current example ending:
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329603Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329672Z ```csharp
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329861Z yield return text.EmitTextDone("First chunk of text. Second chunk. ");
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329866Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0329959Z yield return text.EmitDone();
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330051Z yield return message.EmitDone();
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330125Z ```
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330130Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330195Z with:
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330199Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330271Z ```csharp
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330451Z yield return text.EmitTextDone("First chunk of text. Second chunk. ");
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330455Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330678Z // Optionally attach annotations (file refs, citations, URLs) after finalizing text.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0330859Z // Each call produces a response.output_text.annotation.added SSE event.
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331126Z yield return text.EmitAnnotationAdded(new FilePath(fileId: "/reports/summary.pdf", index: 0));
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331130Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331419Z yield return text.EmitDone();      // response.content_part.done — includes all annotations
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331517Z yield return message.EmitDone();
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331581Z ```
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0331585Z 
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0332371Z Add a note: _`OutputItemMessageBuilder.EmitDone()` reads the `Annotations` property on each tracked `TextContentBuilder` to build the final `content[].annotations` array automatically — no manual wiring needed._
2026-04-11T01:13:42.0332376Z
